entries.title: About the Course
entries.content:
This is meant to be a read-aloud for all ages to enjoy together in the afternoon at least 1 time a week. We encourage you to choose a book that is specific to your region. However, we will offer some suggestions in the Grades 1-3 Literature lessons and Grades 4+ Citizenship lessons. The suggested book titles will be available June 1st in the lesson plans.

This topic is included in the following course(s): Literature: Grade 1, Literature: Grade 2, Literature: Grade 3, Citizenship: Grade 4, Citizenship: Grade 5, Citizenship: Grade 6, Citizenship: Grade 7 (U.S.), Citizenship: Grade 7 (Canada), Citizenship: Grade 8 (U.S.), Citizenship: Grade 8 (Canada), Citizenship: Grade 9 (U.S.), Citizenship: Grade 9 (Canada), Citizenship: Grade 10 (U.S.), Citizenship: Grade 10 (Canada), Citizenship: Grade 11 (U.S.), Citizenship: Grade 11 (Canada), Citizenship: Grade 12
